blocks.content: September in Millhaven meant the heat stuck around but the light changed. Kit had been up since six-fifteen and still gotten to the bike rack before Daisy.
She showed up at seven forty-two with her backpack.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You're never on time. You're early.
She locked her bike next to his and they stood there a second looking at the school.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You just said that about me being early.
